positive: A mystical forest silhouette scene. The primary subject is a harmonious blend of stylized deer, ancient glowing mandalas, and abstract floral patterns interwoven with stylized woodland creatures (foxes, rabbits). The composition must be circular and central, designed as a seamless repeating pattern for apparel. Use clean, deep silhouettes against a rich, dark teal and emerald gradient background, accented by bright, magical neon-cyan and gold glowing elements. Focus on intricate linework, high contrast, and elegant negative space. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau tattoo flash meets minimalist modern vector illustration. Perfect for a dark streetwear hoodie print.
